evals.prompt: Create a multi-stage Dockerfile for our NestJS API. Build stage compiles TypeScript, production stage runs the compiled JS with only production dependencies. Use node:20-alpine as base. Include health check.
evals.expected_output: Multi-stage Dockerfile with build and production stages, non-root user, health check

assertions.name: production_deps_only
assertions.description: Production stage has only production npm dependencies

evals.prompt: Create a docker-compose.yml for local development. Services: NestJS API (port 3000), PostgreSQL (port 5432), Redis (port 6379), and a React frontend (port 3001). All services should have health checks and the API should wait for DB and Redis to be healthy.
evals.expected_output: docker-compose.yml with 4 services, health checks, depends_on with conditions, and named volumes

assertions.name: four_services
assertions.description: API, PostgreSQL, Redis, and frontend services defined

assertions.name: depends_on_healthy
assertions.description: API depends_on DB and Redis with condition: service_healthy

assertions.name: port_mappings
assertions.description: Correct port mappings for all services

evals.prompt: Dockerize our Python Django API. Use multi-stage build with python:3.12-slim. Install dependencies from requirements.txt, collect static files, and run with gunicorn. Include a .dockerignore.
evals.expected_output: Dockerfile for Django with multi-stage build, gunicorn, static files, and .dockerignore

assertions.name: multi_stage
assertions.description: Build stage installs deps, production stage copies only needed files

assertions.name: gunicorn
assertions.description: CMD runs gunicorn, not manage.py runserver

evals.prompt: Create a Docker setup for a monorepo with 3 NestJS services (user, order, product). Each service needs its own Dockerfile. Add a docker-compose.yml that runs all 3 plus shared PostgreSQL and Redis.
evals.expected_output: 3 Dockerfiles and docker-compose.yml with shared infrastructure

assertions.name: shared_db
assertions.description: Single PostgreSQL instance shared across services

assertions.name: shared_redis
assertions.description: Single Redis instance shared across services

assertions.name: service_networking
assertions.description: Services can communicate via Docker network

assertions.name: per_service_env
assertions.description: Each service has its own environment variables

evals.prompt: Our Docker image is 1.2GB. Help optimize it. We're using node:20, installing all dependencies (dev + prod), copying the entire project, and building in a single stage.
evals.expected_output: Optimized Dockerfile reducing image size via multi-stage, alpine, prod-only deps, and .dockerignore

assertions.name: multi_stage_introduced
assertions.description: Splits into build and production stages

assertions.name: prod_deps_only
assertions.description: Production stage only installs production dependencies
